mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgInfoDAO.select 설 명 : 기관 정보 */ SELECT A.ORG_ID , A.ORGNM , A.ORG_NCNM , A.RPRS_TELNO , A.ORG_REG_NO , A.DMNNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG A WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.ORG_ID) AS LINE_NO , A.ORG_ID , A.ORGNM , A.DMNNM , A.RPRS_TELNO , A.ORG_REG_NO , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_USER AA WHERE AA.ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND AA.USER_ID_STSCD = 'APRV_CMPTN' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_AUTHRT CC LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT DD ON CC.AUTHRT_ID = DD.AUTHRT_ID WHERE DD.USER_ID = AA.USER_ID AND CC.AUTHRT_GRPCD = 'ADM' AND CC.AUTHRT_CD = 'SYS_ADM' ) ) AS ADM_CNT , CASE WHEN A.ORG_ID = 'LMSBASIC' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS ODR FROM TB_LMS_ORG A WHERE 1=1 AND USEYN = 'Y'
AND ( A.ORGNM LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR A.ORG_REG_NO LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
ORDER BY ODR, ORGNM
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgInfoDAO.list 설 명 : 기관 정보 목록 */
/* SQL ID : OrgInfoDAO.listPaging 설 명 : 기관 정보 페이징 목록 */
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : OrgInfoDAO.updateUseN 설 명 : 기관 정보 사용안함 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_ORG SET USEYN = 'N' WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgInfoDAO.listOrgAdmUser 설 명 : 기관 전체운영자 목록 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USERNM , A.EMAIL , A.OFCE_TELNO , A.MOBILE_NO FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND MENU_TYCD = 'ADMIN' AND USER_AUTHRT_ID = 'DEV' ) ORDER BY A.USERNM

/* SQL ID : OrgInfoDAO.listActiveOrg 설 명 : 운영 기관 전체 조회 */
SELECT ORG.* FROM ( SELECT TOOI.*, CASE WHEN ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS ODR FROM TB_LMS_ORG TOOI WHERE USEYN = 'Y' ) ORG ORDER BY ODR, ORGNM
